  • Funs

Serialize an R Object to a Raw Vector

Source: R/rxRaw.R
rxSerialize.Rd

Serialize an R Object to a Raw Vector

Usage

rxSerialize(x, type = c("xz", "bzip2", "qs2", "qdata", "base"))

Arguments

x

object to serialize

type

serialization type; one of "qs2", "qdata", "base", "xz" or "bzip2".

Value

raw vector

Author

Matthew L. Fidler

Examples


rxSerialize(mtcars)
#>    [1] 42 5a 68 39 31 41 59 26 53 59 66 9a c1 83 00 04 b9 ff ff ff ff fe 71 d4
#>   [25] 77 ff ff ff f6 ff dd 3f ff ff fe 42 00 a0 34 4c 05 18 40 59 06 60 81 61
#>   [49] 0e 4b 73 50 04 78 34 19 6d 6a db 4d 52 01 92 23 48 64 a3 65 07 a9 ea 78
#>   [73] 98 43 04 8d a8 69 a0 34 d0 68 da 8f 53 d4 18 d4 07 a1 1e a6 83 41 e5 00
#>   [97] 06 46 80 0f 50 f5 1e 93 d4 1a 08 4d 01 1a 9e 91 3d 4c 4f 48 c9 a3 4f 48
#>  [121] 0c 80 32 68 06 86 80 00 d3 40 32 3d 4c 80 34 00 0d 32 00 34 01 22 44 42
#>  [145] 46 8c 4d 00 34 00 3c a0 00 00 00 68 00 00 6d 40 07 a9 a3 40 00 00 34 00
#>  [169] 01 06 13 04 64 c0 4c 02 60 98 20 30 00 09 80 09 80 11 a6 10 c4 60 23 46
#>  [193] 11 84 d1 a0 19 32 64 10 61 30 46 4c 04 c0 26 09 82 03 00 00 98 00 98 01
#>  [217] 1a 61 0c 46 02 34 61 18 4d 1a 01 93 26 42 8e c9 df f3 e0 c9 6a a3 ed 29
#>  [241] 4c f7 b2 73 9c a9 91 0d 43 a6 73 79 59 0c 72 9d 22 c6 34 36 81 b1 ba 2e

rxRawToC(mtcars)
#>    [1] 42 5a 68 39 31 41 59 26 53 59 66 9a c1 83 00 04 b9 ff ff ff ff fe 71 d4
#>   [25] 77 ff ff ff f6 ff dd 3f ff ff fe 42 00 a0 34 4c 05 18 40 59 06 60 81 61
